key_insight: Mask-Proof converts real mathematical proofs into masked-step reconstruction tasks, enabling scalable and reproducible evaluation of step-level reasoning in long-form proofs.
engineering_relevance: It provides a practical benchmark and automated evaluator for measuring and comparing proof reasoning quality across LLMs without relying on costly expert-only grading.
method: Mask key formula steps in authentic proofs while keeping surrounding context.
Ask models to reconstruct the hidden steps.
Use repeated-vote LLM equivalence judging to score correctness stably.
evidence_signal: The released Mask-ProofBench includes 292 curated problems, and the evaluator reports 96.8% agreement with expert annotators across 17 tested models.
watch_item: LLM-based equivalence judging may still miss subtle proof nuances, so stability and calibration should be checked when extending to new mathematical domains.
paper_title: Mask-Proof: An LLM-based Automated Data Curation Pipeline on Mathematical Proofs
